resources.string: Item(s) have been added to the download queue
Permission denied, Did you give permissions
You have ongoing downloading task, still quit?
Filter out bookmarked in search result
Keeping a job in the download (download order to ensure)
Filter by number of Bookmarkes when searching
Restart app for changed to take effect

1. This app is a third-party remake of the Android client of the Japanese illustration exchange website Pixiv.
 2. The project has been open source and is only used for communication and learning, and may not be used for any commercial purposes. 
 3. The copyrights of all illustrations, comics, and novels in the APP belong to their authors or Pixiv
 4. It is recommended to use the original Pixiv.
A work %d, %d characters, reading requires: %d hours %d minute
User name (can be changed at any time)
Sort by popularity (only available for members)
ブリタンニア(ルト系ブリトン人)の アルトリア・ペンドラゴン
Save to local (that can be downloaded to view)
Edit account information and mailbox binding
Two filenames might be the same causing download to fail, thus Required
This will delete all local search history
No permission to view the works
There are currently no muting tags to be removed
This will delete all the muting label
There are no groups yet, ping me if you have created one
QQ is not installed or installed version is not supported
There are no records to be deleted
This will delete all the local browsing history
Does not support View novels series
Photos can not be greater than 5M, this photo Size:
From the old to the new
You do not need to request permission to download a file, but you need to set the directory folder to save the file
The system version is lower than Android 10, unable to customize the folder using legacy mode
The secondary details page displays the original picture
Speed up the loading of pictures. If you think the loading is slow, you can close it
The image quality of the original image is good. If you think that the loading of the original image is too slow, you can close it
Add to private bookmarks by default
R18 works download to another directory
Please log out and log in again
Tab order at the bottom of app
Are you sure you want to delete this record
Due to technical constraints, Chinese mainland users need to bypass GFW for login / registration operations.
Failed to create file. The authorized download directory does not exist
Hide favorite button in My favorites page
Custom novel download folder are not supported yet
This will delete all muted users
There are currently no muted users to delete
R18 option has not been enabled for your account, do you want to enable it?
Illust detail page long press to download
Save to a separate folder by author
The size of the source image exceeds the limit
The details page displays the original picture
Long press the avatar in drawer to switch temporarily
Backup browsing history too (maybe very large)?
Initial position of the navigation bar
Sort by popularity (Restrictions for non-premium users)
Session expired, logging you back in~
Where is the order of popularity?
Popularity ranking is now located in the search options/sorting method in the sliding bar on the right. You can set it through the setting button in the upper right corner. Please save after setting.
Search options are only valid for illustrations and novels
Keep screen on in illust detail
AI works download to another directory
Violation of other Terms of Service
Please allow installing from unknown sources
Google Play version, please update via the store
If you like using Shaft, please take a moment to rate us. Your support means a lot!
Pick an image from gallery\nto experience AI enhancement
Different models excel at different styles
Built by Bilibili for anime and illustrations. Sharper lines, cleaner colors — ideal for Pixiv artwork. Best quality ceiling, recommended for maximum fidelity.
General-purpose super-resolution model for all image types. Faster processing with real-time progress. A solid choice if you\'re unsure.
Import failed: file is empty or malformed
Import failed: file is empty or malformed
No comments yet — be the first to comment
This novel has no chapter markers
Novel info not loaded yet, try again later
No app found to handle this
Keeps titles & paragraphs, images as links
A4 layout for printing (no images yet)
No position bookmarks yet.\nTap "Save position" in the More menu.
No notes or highlights yet.\nLong-press text → pick a color to save.
This user has no works of this type
Manually select chapters, each saved as a separate file
Download every chapter as its own file
Merge all chapters into a single file
Series is still loading, please try again later
Merged download failed: could not write file
Merged download finished, but %1$d chapter(s) failed to fetch (skipped)
Select multiple series; each series merged into its own file
Every series merged into its own file
Merge every chapter of every series into a single file
No series loaded yet, please try again later
Please select at least one series
Cross-series merged download failed: could not write file
